title: Cobblemon Pasture Enhanced
description: Better visual feedback for Cobblemon’s Pasture block. Clear egg state at a glance, optional overlay style, and polished textures.
body: ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_d40c56dc-149a-4a4d-9bf9-b28180b1bc10.png) *** ## 🌾 **Version 2.0 Update** This new update refines the Pasture model and visuals for a cleaner, more cohesive Cobblemon experience: * 🧱 **Back section fixed and improved** — the lower rear area of the machine now displays correctly across all faces * 🪶 **Egg straw area reworked** — expanded and redesigned for better readability and a more natural look * ⚙️ **Updated pack meta** — improved `pack.mcmeta` support for Minecraft 1.20 → 1.21.1 *** ## 🪴 **What is this** **Cobblemon Pasture Enhanced** improves the Pasture block visuals so you can instantly see egg readiness without opening any menus. It focuses only on the Pasture and egg related cues, keeping the look clean and consistent with Cobblemon. ### **Why you might want it** * Faster breeding loops thanks to clear visual states * No gameplay changes, only textures and model tweaks * Lightweight, client side, easy to drop into any Cobblemon setup *** ## ✨ **Features** * **Pasture block clarity**: distinct textures for idle and egg ready states * **Egg focused visuals**: subtle, readable indicators without noisy UI * **Full model coverage**: back section of the Pasture now properly textured and aligned * **Egg straw area rework**: enlarged and refined straw zone for better visual balance * **Consistent art direction**: faithful to Cobblemon’s style * **Improved metadata**: updated `pack.mcmeta` for smoother cross-version support * **Two builds**: * MC **1.21–1.21.1** * MC **1.20–1.20.1** > Scope is intentionally narrow: Pasture and egg feedback only. No unrelated blocks or items, which keeps it compatible with most packs. *** ## 🛠 **Compatibility** * **Minecraft**: 1.20–1.20.1, 1.21–1.21.1 * **Mod loader**: Works fine with Forge, NeoForge, and Fabric as long as you run Cobblemon * **Client side**: Can be used on any server with Cobblemon. No server install required. * **Load order**: Put this resource pack **above** other Cobblemon related packs to ensure it overrides Pasture textures. *** ## 📥 **Installation** 1. Download the file that matches your game version: * `Cobblemon_Pasture_Enhanced_MC_1.20-1.20.1.zip` * `Cobblemon_Pasture_Enhanced_MC_1.21-1.21.1.zip` 2. Move the zip into `resourcepacks` 3. In game go to **Options → Resource Packs** and enable it 4. Place it **above** other Cobblemon packs 5. Press **F3 + T** to reload resources if needed *** ## ❓ **FAQ** **Q: Does this change breeding mechanics?** A: No. Visual feedback only. **Q: Can I use it with other texture packs?** A: Yes. Put it on top so Pasture overrides apply. **Q: Server needs it?** A: Client side only. Server not required. **Q: I still see the default Pasture** A: Make sure the pack is on top, then press **F3 + T**. If you use another Cobblemon override, check conflicts. *** ## 🤝 **Partnered with BisectHosting** [Looking to play your modpack with friends on a reliable server?](https://bisecthosting.com/OurStory) **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/OurStory)** is the perfect choice for hosting your **Cobblemon** adventure — with 20+ global server locations and over 10 years of experience, they guarantee smooth, lag-free gameplay. ✨ **Features**: * Automated modpack setup & updates * 24/7 support * Instant setup * Affordable plans 🎁 **Use code `OurStory`** for **25% off** your first month as a new customer! > 🧭 Start your journey with ease — host your server with confidence. *** ## 📜 **Permissions** * You may include this pack in a public modpack as long as you link back to this page and do not rehost files. * Do not monetize, rebrand, or claim authorship. *** ## 🔗 **Links** * Discord: [Join here](https://discord.gg/kb8NSTF45n) * Related pack: [Enhanced Cobblemon Boss Bars](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/enhanced-cobblemon-boss-bars)
